doi_source: Fold-local mapping entry for prior package version ess-dive-64109adb5fba6b5-20260114T183043578 uses this DOI and is marked as a prior version of the held-out package.

files.name: NEON_plot_TDR.csv
files.interpretation: Direct dated TDR volumetric water content observations with embedded UTM coordinates. VWC_1 and VWC_2 are replicate measurements; avg_VWC is a derived average and is not used as an independent measurement.

files.name: ess-dive-64109adb5fba6b5-20260114T183043578/NEON_2018_EMI_survey
files.interpretation: Directory was present but contained no files in the allowed raw package listing.

rules: Contains direct volumetric water content observations.
Machine-readable dated CSV payload is available.
Site identifiers and UTM coordinates are embedded in the payload.

harmonization_plan.datetime_UTC: Parse Collection Date as America/Denver local date and convert local midnight to UTC.
harmonization_plan.depth_note: No depth column or fold-local held-out metadata was available; preserve as missing rather than infer a depth.
harmonization_plan.replicate: Parse replicate 1 and 2 from VWC_1 and VWC_2.
harmonization_plan.volumetric_water_content_m3_m3: Melt VWC_1 and VWC_2, drop -9999 sentinels, divide by 100.

quality_filters: Drop rows whose Collection Date cannot be parsed.
Drop VWC replicate values equal to -9999 or otherwise nonnumeric.
Do not use avg_VWC because it is derived from replicate measurements.
